prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "The agent failed to retrieve the latest timestamped values for the sensors and instead only listed the available sensors."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent failed to retrieve the latest timestamped values for the sensors and instead only listed the available sensors.
